channel.title: double point on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in double point on changcui

item.title: Linked List Cycle II
item.description: // 思路一：先判断是否有环，然后一个从相遇处出发，一个从头节点出发，必然相遇到入口 class Solution { public: ListNode *detectCycle(ListNode *head) { if (!head || !head->next) return NULL; auto slow = head->next, fast = head->next->next; while (fast && fast != slow) { slow = slow->next; fast = fast->next ? fast->next->next : NULL; } if (fast) fast = head; while (fast && fast != slow) { fast = fast->next; slow = slow->next; } return fast; } }; // Runtime: 12 ms, faster than 77.

item.title: 345.Reverse Vowels of a String
item.description: class Solution { public: string reverseVowels(string s) { int i = 0, j = s.size() - 1; while (i < j) { while (i < j && s[i] != 'a' && s[i] != 'e' && s[i] != 'i' && s[i] != 'o' && s[i] != 'u' && s[i] != 'A' && s[i] != 'E' && s[i] != 'I' && s[i] != 'O' && s[i] != 'U') i++; while (i < j && s[j] !

item.title: Linked List Cycle
item.description: // 思路一：双指针，一快一慢 class Solution { public: bool hasCycle(ListNode *head) { auto slow = head, fast = head; while (fast && fast->next) { slow = slow->next; fast = fast->next->next; if (fast == slow) return true; } return false; } }; // Runtime: 8 ms, faster than 97.13% of C++ online submissions for Linked List Cycle. // Memory Usage: 7.7 MB, less than 100.00% of C++ online submissions for Linked List Cycle.
